data.title: Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, StartTime
Start-Sleep 3; Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, StartTime; netstat -ano | Select-String ":5173"
echo "Placeholder CV - Replace with your actual CV.pdf" > public\cv.txt; Copy-Item public\cv.txt public\cv.pdf; Remove-Item public\cv.txt

$content = @"
%PDF-1.4
1 0 obj
<< /Type /Catalog /Pages 2 0 R >>
endobj
2 0 obj
<< /Type /Pages /Kids [3 0 R] /Count 1 >>
endobj
3 0 obj
<< /Type /Page /Parent 2 0 R /MediaBox [0 0 612 792] /Contents 4 0 R /Resources << /Font << /F1 5 0 R >> >> >>
endobj
4 0 obj
<< /Length 132 >>
stream
BT
/F1 24 Tf
100 700 Td
(Luca Pugliese - CV) Tj
/F1 14 Tf
0 -40 Td
(Firmware & Embedded Engineer) Tj
0 -30 Td
(Replace this file with your actual CV) Tj
ET
endstream
endobj
5 0 obj
<< /Type /Font /Subtype /Type1 /BaseFont /Helvetica >>
endobj
xref
0 6
...
trailer
<< /Size 6 /Root 1 0 R >>
startxref
312
%%EOF
"@
Set-Content -Path "public\cv.pdf" -Value $content -Encoding Ascii

Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite --host 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "C:\Users\epome\OneDrive\Desktop\portfolio"

Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite --host 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "C:\Users\epome\OneDrive\Desktop\portfolio"; Start-Sleep 5; npm run build 2>&1
Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-Table Id, ProcessName, StartTime; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173/portfolio/
Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; npm run build 2>&1

Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite --host 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "C:\Users\epome\OneDrive\Desktop\portfolio"; Start-Sleep 5; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173/portfolio/
Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; npm run build 2>&1

Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite --host 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "C:\Users\epome\OneDrive\Desktop\portfolio"; Start-Sleep 4; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173/portfolio/
Get-Process -Name "node" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Start-Sleep 1; npm run build 2>&1

Start-Process -WindowStyle Hidden -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c npx vite --host 0.0.0.0" -WorkingDirectory "C:\Users\epome\OneDrive\Desktop\portfolio"; Start-Sleep 4; curl.exe -s -o NUL -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:5173/portfolio/

python3 -c "
import re

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Find all selectors and their rules using regex
# Pattern: selector{properties}
rules = re.findall(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}', css)

print(f'Total CSS rules found: {len(rules)}')
# Print first 30 rules to understand the structure
for i, (sel, props) in enumerate(rules[:30]):
    print(f'--- Rule {i+1} ---')
    print(f'Selector: {sel.strip()[:100]}')
    print(f'Props: {props.strip()[:200]}')
    print()
"

python -c "
import re, json

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Find ALL CSS rules
rules = re.findall(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}', css)

# Collect rules by selector category
results = []
for sel, props in rules:
    sel_stripped = sel.strip()
    results.append({'selector': sel_stripped[:200], 'props': props.strip()[:300]})

print(f'Total: {len(results)} rules')
# Save to JSON for easier browsing
with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\rules.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    json.dump(results, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=1)

print('Saved to rules.json')
" 2>&1

python -c "
import re, json

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\rules.json', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    rules = json.load(f)

# Helper to search rules
def search(needle):
    result = []
    for r in rules:
        sel = r['selector'].lower()
        if needle.lower() in sel:
            result.append(r)
    return result

# Let's find the main categories
categories = [':root', '.header', '.hero', '.article', '.footer', '.button', '.widget', '.section-title', '.section-head', '.sidebar', '.tag', '.pagination', '.load-more', '.hamburger', '.search', '.logos', '.splide', '.section-tags', '.row', '.col', '.container']

for cat in categories:
    matches = search(cat)
    print(f'\n=== {cat} === ({len(matches)} matches)')
    for m in matches[:15]:
        print(f'  {m[\"selector\"][:120]}')

'@ | Out-File -FilePath 'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\search_cats.py' -Encoding UTF8

python -c "
import re

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Extract all rules with their original text
def extract_rules_for_selectors(css, pattern):
    \"\"\"Find all CSS rules where the selector matches the pattern and return formatted CSS.\"\"\"
    # Match all CSS rules
    rule_pattern = re.compile(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}')
    matches = rule_pattern.findall(css)
    
    result = []
    for selector, props in matches:
        sel_stripped = selector.strip()
        if re.search(pattern, sel_stripped, re.IGNORECASE):
            # Format nicely
            props_clean = props.strip()
            result.append(f'{sel_stripped} {{\n    {props_clean}\n}}')
    
    return '\n\n'.join(result)

# 1. :root custom properties
print('=' * 80)
print('1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES (:root and :root[dark])')
print('=' * 80)
print(extract_rules_for_selectors(css, r'^/\*.*MAIN|\}:?root|^:root'))
print()
" 2>&1

@"
import re
import json

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Parse all CSS rules
rule_pattern = re.compile(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}')
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find_rules(pattern_str, case_sensitive=False):
    flags = 0 if case_sensitive else re.IGNORECASE
    pat = re.compile(pattern_str, flags)
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel_stripped = selector.strip()
        if pat.search(sel_stripped):
            props_clean = props.strip()
            results.append(f"{sel_stripped} {{\n  {props_clean}\n}}")
    return results

def print_section(title, pattern_str):
    print(f"{'=' * 80}")
    print(f"// {title}")
    print(f"{'=' * 80}")
    results = find_rules(pattern_str)
    for r in results:
        print(r)
        print()
    return results

# 1. :root CSS custom properties
print_section("1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES - :root and :root[dark]", r"^/\*.*MAIN.*STYLESHEET|^:root$|^:root\[dark\]")
"@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_css.py" -Encoding UTF8

"@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_css.py" -Encoding UTF8

@"
import re

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Parse all CSS rules
rule_pattern = re.compile(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}')
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find_rules(patterns, mode='any'):
    """Find all CSS rules matching any/all of the given patterns."""
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel_stripped = selector.strip()
        props_clean = props.strip()
        
        match = False
        if mode == 'any':
            match = any(re.search(p, sel_stripped, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == 'all':
            match = all(re.search(p, sel_stripped, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel_stripped} {{\n  {props_clean}\n}}")
    return results

def print_section(title, patterns, mode='any'):
    print(f"\n{'=' * 80}")
    print(f"// {title}")
    print(f"{'=' * 80}")
    results = find_rules(patterns, mode)
    for r in results:
        print(r)
        print()
    return results

# 1. :root CSS custom properties
print_section("1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES", [r'^/\*.*STYLESHEET|:root$|^:root\[dark\]'])

# 2. .header
print_section("2. HEADER STYLES", [r'\.header'])
"@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_css.py" -Encoding UTF8

@"
import re
import json

with open(r'C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    css = f.read()

# Parse all CSS rules
rule_pattern = re.compile(r'([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}')
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find_rules(patterns, mode='any'):
    """Find all CSS rules matching any/all of the given patterns, cleaned."""
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel_stripped = selector.strip()
        props_clean = props.strip()
        
        # Clean up leading } artifacts
        sel_stripped = re.sub(r'^[}]\s*', '', sel_stripped)
        
        match = False
        if mode == 'any':
            match = any(re.search(p, sel_stripped, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == 'all':
            match = all(re.search(p, sel_stripped, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel_stripped} {{\n  {props_clean}\n}}")
    return results

def print_section(title, patterns, mode='any'):
    print(f"\n{'=' * 80}")
    print(f"// {title}")
    print(f"{'=' * 80}")
    results = find_rules(patterns, mode)
    for r in results:
        print(r)
        print()
    return results

# 1. :root
print_section("1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES", [r'^/\*.*STYLESHEET|:root$|^:root\[dark\]'])
"@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_css.py" -Encoding UTF8

@'
import re
import json

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    css = f.read()

# Parse all CSS rules
rule_pattern = re.compile(r"([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}")
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find(patterns, mode="any"):
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel = selector.strip()
        # Clean } artifacts
        sel = re.sub(r"^[}\s]+", "", sel)
        if not sel:
            continue
        match = False
        if mode == "any":
            match = any(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == "all":
            match = all(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel} {{\n  {props.strip()}\n}}")
    return results

def ps(title, patterns, mode="any"):
    lines = []
    lines.append(f"\n{'=' * 80}")
    lines.append(f"// {title}")
    lines.append(f"{'=' * 80}")
    results = find(patterns, mode)
    for r in results:
        lines.append(r)
        lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)

# Collect all output
output = []

# 1. :root
output.append(ps("1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES", [r"^/\*.*STYLESHEET|:root$|^:root\[dark\]"]))

# 2. .header
output.append(ps("2. HEADER STYLES", [r"\.header"]))

# 3. .hero
output.append(ps("3. HERO STYLES", [r"\.hero"]))

# 4. .article
output.append(ps("4. ARTICLE / CARD STYLES", [r"\.article"]))

# 5. .footer
output.append(ps("5. FOOTER STYLES", [r"\.footer"]))

# 6. .button
output.append(ps("6. BUTTON STYLES", [r"\.button"]))

# 7. .section-title, .section-head
output.append(ps("7. SECTION-TITLE & SECTION-HEAD STYLES", [r"\.section-title|\.section-head"]))

# 8. .sidebar & .widget
output.append(ps("8. SIDEBAR & WIDGET STYLES", [r"\.sidebar|\.widget"]))

# 9. .tag
output.append(ps("9. TAG STYLES", [r"\.tag-cloud|\.article__tag|\.tags__inner"]))

# 10. .pagination / load-more
output.append(ps("10. PAGINATION & LOAD-MORE STYLES", [r"\.pagination|\.load-more"]))

# 11. .hamburger
output.append(ps("11. HAMBURGER / MOBILE MENU STYLES", [r"\.hamburger"]))

# 12. .search
output.append(ps("12. SEARCH STYLES", [r"\.search"]))

# 13. .logos / splide carousel
output.append(ps("13. LOGOS / SPLIDE CAROUSEL STYLES", [r"\.logos|\.splide"]))

# 14. .section-tags
output.append(ps("14. SECTION-TAGS STYLES", [r"\.section-tags"]))

# 15. .container / .row / .col grid system
output.append(ps("15. CONTAINER, ROW, COL GRID SYSTEM", [r"\.container|\.row|\.col$|\.col-\d"]))

# Also add .section-videos if it exists (referenced in .row context)
output.append(ps("16. ADDITIONAL: SECTION-VIDEOS", [r"\.section-videos"]))

# Write output to file
result = "\n".join(output)
with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extracted_css.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(result)

print("Done! Output written to extracted_css.txt")
print(f"Total chars: {len(result)}")
'@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_all.py" -Encoding UTF8

@'
import re
import json

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    css = f.read()

rule_pattern = re.compile(r"([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}")
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find(patterns, mode="any"):
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel = re.sub(r"^[}\s]+", "", selector.strip())
        if not sel:
            continue
        match = False
        if mode == "any":
            match = any(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == "all":
            match = all(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel} {{\n  {props.strip()}\n}}")
    return results

def ps(title, patterns, mode="any"):
    lines = [f"\n{'=' * 80}", f"// {title}", f"{'=' * 80}"]
    results = find(patterns, mode)
    for r in results:
        lines.append(r)
        lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)

output = []

# Also capture section__head/section__title patterns
output.append(ps("7a. SECTION__HEAD / SECTION__TITLE", [r"\.section__head|\.section__title"]))

# Look for nav / nav-button / mobile-menu
output.append(ps("17. NAV / NAV-BUTTON / MOBILE MENU", [r"\.nav-button|\.nav\b|\.mobile-menu"]))

# Look for video-icon
output.append(ps("18. VIDEO-ICON", [r"\.video-icon"]))

# Look for logos__inner animation
output.append(ps("19. KEYFRAMES / ANIMATIONS", [r"@keyframes"]))

# Look for .copyright
output.append(ps("20. COPYRIGHT / BOTTOM BAR", [r"\.copyright"]))

# Look for responsive / media queries
output.append(ps("21. MEDIA QUERIES", [r"@media"]))

result = "\n".join(output)
with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extracted_css_2.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(result)
print("Done! Check extracted_css_2.txt")
'@ | Out-File -FilePath "C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extract_more.py" -Encoding UTF8

@'
import re

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    css = f.read()

rule_pattern = re.compile(r"([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}")
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find(patterns, mode="any"):
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel = re.sub(r"^[}\s]+", "", selector.strip())
        if not sel:
            continue
        match = False
        if mode == "any":
            match = any(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == "all":
            match = all(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel} {{\n  {props.strip()}\n}}")
    return results

def ps(title, patterns, mode="any"):
    lines = [f"\n{'=' * 80}", f"// {title}", f"{'=' * 80}"]
    results = find(patterns, mode)
    for r in results:
        lines.append(r)
        lines.append("")
    return "\n".join(lines)

output = []

# Add main-nav
output.append(ps("22. MAIN-NAV", [r"\.main-nav"]))

# Add responsive col classes
output.append(ps("23. RESPONSIVE COLUMN CLASSES (col-w-, col-d-, col-t-, col-m-)", [r"\.col-[wdtm]-\d+"]))

# Add section general
output.append(ps("24. SECTION GENERAL", [r"^\.section$|^\.section\b"]))

# Add blog toggle
output.append(ps("25. BLOG TOGGLE", [r"\.blog__toggle"]))

result = "\n".join(output)
with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extracted_css_3.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write(result)
print("Done!")

@'
import re

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    css = f.read()

rule_pattern = re.compile(r"([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}")
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find(patterns, mode="any"):
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel = re.sub(r"^[}\s]+", "", selector.strip())
        if not sel:
            continue
        match = False
        if mode == "any":
            match = any(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == "all":
            match = all(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel} {{\n  {props.strip()}\n}}")
    return results

# Check for any other notable selectors referenced in code
categories = [
    ("COLOR SCHEME / TOGGLE", [r"\.color-scheme|\.toggle-sun|\.toggle-moon"]),
    ("TOP / SCROLL TO TOP", [r"^\.top\b"]),
    ("DARK MODE GENERAL", [r"^\.dark-mode"]),
    ("RECENT POSTS", [r"\.recent-posts"]),
    ("RELATED POSTS", [r"\.related-posts"]),
    ("NAV DROPDOWN", [r"\.dropdown-"]),
    ("PREV / NEXT / NAVIGATION", [r"\.post__navigation|\.post__prev|\.post__next"]),
]

output = []
for title, pats in categories:
    results = find(pats)
    if results:
        output.append(f"\n{'=' * 80}")
        output.append(f"// {title}")
        output.append(f"{'=' * 80}")
        for r in results:
            output.append(r)
            output.append("")

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extracted_css_4.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(output))
print("Done!")

@'
import re

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\coderon_css.txt", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    css = f.read()

rule_pattern = re.compile(r"([^{]+?)\s*\{([^}]+)\}")
all_rules = rule_pattern.findall(css)

def find(patterns, mode="any"):
    results = []
    for selector, props in all_rules:
        sel = re.sub(r"^[}\s]+", "", selector.strip())
        if not sel:
            continue
        match = False
        if mode == "any":
            match = any(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        elif mode == "all":
            match = all(re.search(p, sel, re.IGNORECASE) for p in patterns)
        if match:
            results.append(f"{sel} {{\n  {props.strip()}\n}}")
    return results

categories = [
    ("NAV LIST", [r"^\.nav__list"]),
    ("LOGO", [r"\.logo"]),
]

output = []
for title, pats in categories:
    results = find(pats)
    if results:
        output.append(f"\n{'=' * 80}")
        output.append(f"// {title}")
        output.append(f"{'=' * 80}")
        for r in results:
            output.append(r)
            output.append("")

with open(r"C:\Users\epome\AppData\Local\Temp\opencode\extracted_css_5.txt", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    f.write("\n".join(output))
print("Done!")
